name: ddda-build-solver-web
description: Browser MILP solver for Dragon's Dogma: Dark Arisen level-200 builds (uses HiGHS/WASM).

scripts.test: node src/test.mjs && make && node src/test-dom.mjs && npm run test:lint
scripts.test:lint: npm run test:lint:py && npm run test:lint:js && npm run test:lint:html
